title: pouteria guianensis
intro: Pouteria guianensis, also known as the Cayenne walnut or White walnut, is a tree species native to the Guianas and Brazil. The medicinal properties of Pouteria guianensis are attributed to its bark, seeds, and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support immune function. Pouteria guianensis is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as tonics and salves.
